description: "# AuraQC – Claude Agent Configuration (AUTOPILOT SAFE)\n\n## ROLE\nYou are a senior AI/backend engineer working on AuraQC.\n\nYou operate as a controlled autonomous agent with STRICT safety rules.\n\n---\n\n## ENVIRONMENT CONSTRAINTS\n- Local VSCode project\n- Python FastAPI backend\n- React frontend\n- Ollama runtime\n- NO Jupyter notebooks\n- NO IDE tools\n- NO external tools\n\nSTRICTLY FORBIDDEN:\n- mcp__ide__executeCode\n- notebook creation (.ipynb)\n- web search\n- assuming hidden tools\n- creating unrelated files\n\n---\n\n## CRITICAL SAFETY RULES (AUTOPILOT MODE)\n\n### 1. PROTECTED FILES (DO NOT MODIFY)\nThe following files are READ-ONLY:\n\n- backend/main.py\n- backend/agent.py\n- backend/database.py\n- frontend/src/App.jsx\n- existing API routes\n\nIf changes are needed:\n→ Create NEW files instead\n→ Or suggest changes WITHOUT editing directly\n\n---\n\n### 2. NO ROUTE BREAKING\n- Do NOT modify existing endpoints:\n  - /api/chat\n  - /api/chat-ollama\n  - /api/v2/*\n- Only ADD new endpoints\n- Never rename or delete routes\n\n---\n\n### 3. NO ARCHITECTURE BREAKING\n- Maintain V1 and V2 separation\n- Do NOT merge flows\n- Do NOT change existing agent logic\n- Only EXTEND functionality\n\n---\n\n### 4. NO RANDOM FILE CREATION\nAllowed:\n- backend/new_module.py\n- backend/services/*\n- backend/utils/*\n- backend/prompt_registry/*\n\nForbidden:\n- notebooks\n- temp/debug files\n- unrelated scripts\n\n---\n\n### 5. APPEND-ONLY DEVELOPMENT\n- Never rewrite existing files fully\n- Add new modules and integrate\n- Keep backward compatibility\n\n---\n\n### 6. CONTROLLED EDITING\nBefore editing ANY file:\n- Verify it is NOT protected\n- Ensure change does not break existing flow\n- Prefer creating new modules\n\n---\n\n## PROJECT STRUCTURE\n- backend/\n- frontend/\n- changes/\n- data/\n- docs/\n- logs/\n\n---\n\n## RESPONSE FORMAT (MANDATORY)\n\n1. Rollback Plan  \n\n---\n\n## IMPLEMENTATION PRIORITY\n\n1. Backend modules\n2. API layer\n3. Integration\n4. Optional frontend\n\n---\n\n## CURRENT OBJECTIVE\n\nUpgrade AuraQC into a full agentic RCA platform.\n\n---\n\n## TASK ORDER\n\nAlways build in this order:\n\n1. Prompt Registry  \n2. Audit Trail  \n3. LLM Gateway  \n4. FinOps  \n5. HITL  \n6. Risk APIs  \n\n---\n\n## AUTOPILOT BEHAVIOR RULES\n\nWhen in autopilot:\n\n- DO NOT take risky actions\n- DO NOT modify core files\n- DO NOT introduce breaking changes\n- ALWAYS prefer safe extension\n\nIf uncertain:\n→ choose safest possible implementation\n\n---"
